questions.question: What is the purpose of the Mac OCI Tool?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes the Mac OCI Tool as a tool used to update the firmware of the Hub & Scaler, and to modify XML or INI parameters to update the Hub & Scaler bin files.

questions.question: How is the Mac OCI Tool used to demonstrate the connection between a Mac laptop and the Z40 device?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the Mac OCI Tool is used to show that the Mac laptop is connected to the Z40 device via a Type-C connection, and that the Z40 screen is displayed as an extended screen on the Mac.

questions.question: What other resources are mentioned in the synthesis text?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions three other resources: Clawdbot self-hosting and security defense, Genesys Logic Spec, and How To Grab DebugView Log.
